task_completion.description: Verify the parent chassis 'Compute Node Alpha' exists with the correct tag, model, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an asset record or list in the Snipe-IT interface showing Asset Name 'Compute Node Alpha', Asset Tag 'AI-CHASSIS-01', Model 'Dell PowerEdge XE9680', and Status 'Ready to Deploy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the two new GPU assets have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset records or a list showing the new GPUs with Asset Tags 'GPU-H100-101' and 'GPU-H100-102', both with the status 'Ready to Deploy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the legacy GPUs were checked in from their previous assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset history or status of 'GPU-H100-001' and 'GPU-H100-002' showing a 'Checkin' action, or verify they are no longer checked out to 'AI-CHASSIS-LEGACY'.

task_completion.description: Verify all four GPUs are checked out to the parent chassis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Assets' or 'Components' tab under the 'AI-CHASSIS-01' asset page showing all four GPUs ('GPU-H100-101', 'GPU-H100-102', 'GPU-H100-001', 'GPU-H100-002') as assigned/checked out to it, or check the individual GPU pages showing their target as 'AI-CHASSIS-01'.

task_completion.description: Verify the parent chassis is deployed to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'AI-CHASSIS-01' asset page or asset list showing its Location or 'Checked Out To' status as 'Data Center - Rack 42'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually filled out the forms in Snipe-IT.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing the agent typing into form fields (e.g., Asset Tag, Asset Name, Checkout target) rather than just a final screen that might have been manipulated via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: Verify there is no direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/SQLite prompts or database update commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Target Chassis Tag: 'AI-CHASSIS-01'. Expected New GPU Tags: 'GPU-H100-101' and 'GPU-H100-102'. Expected Legacy GPU Tags: 'GPU-H100-001' and 'GPU-H100-002'. Expected Target Location: 'Data Center - Rack 42'.
